items.title: changelog.md.txt - Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026. In March 2026, Google released gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview, a new audio-to-audio (A2A) model optimized for real-time dialogue and voice-first applications. Alongside this, they launched Lyria 3 music generation models — lyria-3-clip-preview (30-second clips) and lyria-3-pro-preview (full-length songs) — both accepting text and image inputs and producing 48kHz stereo audio. New capabilities include Built-in Tools and Function Calling Co

items.title: Google DeepMind on X — Deep Think mode upgrade for Gemini App
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind and Google AI have been active on Twitter in early 2026 with several major announcements. On the robotics front, Google DeepMind announced back-to-back research partnerships — one with Boston Dynamics to integrate Gemini Robotics capabilities into their Atlas humanoid robots, and another with Agile Robots to bring Gemini foundation models into next-generation robotic hardware. These signal a major push into embodied AI and physical robotics. Additionally, Google DeepMind announce

items.title: Update: Gemini 3.1 Rollout is Underway! · google-gemini/gemini-cli · Discussion #19724
items.author: github.com
items.snippet:
Google's Gemini CLI repository on GitHub has been actively updated in early 2026, with release notes documented for January 13, 2026. The google-gemini/gemini-cli project has seen significant updates including a rollout of Gemini 3.1 support, with a community discussion thread titled 'Update: Gemini 3.1 Rollout is Underway!' confirming the model transition is actively in progress. The CLI project appears to be a primary distribution channel for Google's latest Gemini model integrations.

Gemini

items.title: Google Antigravity Changelog
items.author: antigravity.google
items.snippet: Google Antigravity, Google's agentic development platform, has seen active development in early 2026. The platform — which powers the Build mode experience in Google AI Studio — allows developers to deploy agents that autonomously plan, execute, and verify complex tasks across their editor, terminal, and browser. Recent updates include full-stack vibe coding support: the Antigravity coding agent can now build multiplayer experiences, auto-provision Cloud Firestore databases and Firebase Authenti

items.title: Firebase Studio — Official Docs
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's cloud-based agentic development environment that combines Project IDX with Gemini AI assistance, enabling developers to build full-stack apps — including games — without leaving the browser. The platform supports an App Prototyping agent mode where users can describe an app idea (such as a puzzle or arcade game) in natural language and have Gemini generate working HTML/CSS/JavaScript code, as well as a full Code OSS-based IDE for deeper development work. Firebase Stud

The google-gemini/gemini-cli project has seen significant updates including a rollout of Gemini 3.1 support, with a community discussion thread titled 'Update: Gemini 3.1 Rollout is Underway!' confirming the model transition is actively in progress. The CLI project appears to be a primary distribution channel for Google's latest Gemini model integrations.

items.title: Google DeepMind · GitHub
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been prolific in early 2026, with several notable research directions. A standout initiative is Gemini Deep Think, an advanced AI system that has demonstrated breakthrough performance on Olympiad-level mathematical problems, surpassing the IMO-Gold benchmark from July 2025. DeepMind has published papers on AI-assisted mathematical discovery — including one where AI independently calculated structure constants in arithmetic geometry and another demonstrating human-AI collabora

items.title: Google AI Studio quickstart | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet:
The Gemini API provides robust support for both structured outputs and function calling, with dedicated documentation on ai.google.dev. Structured outputs allow developers to configure Gemini models to return responses that conform to a provided JSON Schema, enabling type-safe, predictable results. The Google GenAI SDKs simplify schema definition via Pydantic (Python) and Zod (JavaScript/TypeScript), making it straightforward to extract structured data from unstructured text at scale.

Function
